notes: 6-clip mix (s06b merges settings + present steps because final two steps rendered same tooltip in recording). Liam for intro/setup steps, Alice for action/feature/closing steps. Mean audio level -18.9 dB, no clipping. No overlap in 0:00-0:08 window (s01 starts at 0.0s, s02 at 5.5s).

steps.display_text: An Open Ended slide lets your audience answer in their own words — no fixed choices, just real responses.
steps.tts_text: An Open Ended slide lets your audience answer in their own words — no fixed choices, just real responses.

steps.display_text: Click New presentation to start a fresh deck.
steps.tts_text: Click New presentation to start a fresh deck.

steps.display_text: Select Open Ended from the slide type picker.
steps.tts_text: Select Open Ended from the slide type picker.

steps.display_text: Type your question. Make it specific enough to spark a real response.
steps.tts_text: Type your question. Make it specific enough to spark a real response.

steps.display_text: Pick Grid to show all responses at once, or One by one to reveal them individually.
steps.tts_text: Pick Grid to show all responses at once, or One by one to reveal them individually.

steps.display_text: Toggle on Time limit, Hide results, or Allow images to fine-tune your slide. Then hit Present — responses appear live on your screen.
steps.tts_text: Toggle on Time limit, Hide results, or Allow images to fine-tune your slide. Then hit Present — responses appear live on your screen.

mix_command: ffmpeg -y -i open-ended-final.webm -i vo/s01.mp3 -i vo/s02.mp3 -i vo/s03.mp3 -i vo/s04.mp3 -i vo/s05.mp3 -i vo/s06b.mp3 -filter_complex '[1:a]adelay=0|0[a1];[2:a]adelay=5500|5500[a2];[3:a]adelay=8000|8000[a3];[4:a]adelay=10000|10000[a4];[5:a]adelay=14500|14500[a5];[6:a]adelay=16000|16000[a6];[a1][a2][a3][a4][a5][a6]amix=inputs=6:normalize=0[aout]' -map 0:v -map '[aout]' -c:v copy -c:a libopus -b:a 64k open-ended-narrated.webm
